__fixture__.name: protected_walk_unverified_publisher_deny
__fixture__.scenario: Protected walk for the review-only / deny branch. An unverified-publisher row with a complete manifest and one declared permission (UI command contribution). The install-review card pins a review_only decision and a `Limited` chrome chip. The permission prompt offers deny and details only — no approve action is rendered (auto-admit is suppressed for review-only rows). The user denies; the wedge transitions to a clean denied state with `read_only_inspection_continues` as the degraded capability and the manifest remains visible for review.

requester.request_origin_label: Extension install/review wedge — unverified publisher review path.

scope_target_label: Current workspace root — UI command contribution only.
grant_persistence_label: Once — review only; no remembered grant created.

denial_branch.deny_path_label: Manifest remains visible for review; the extension is not enabled.

prompt_questions.who_is_asking: Indie Author Quick Notes (unverified publisher) is asking to contribute one UI command.
prompt_questions.what_boundary: Workspace UI command contribution under the quick_notes namespace.
prompt_questions.why_needed: The extension wants to expose a command that opens the user's quick notes.
prompt_questions.what_changes_if_allowed: Approval is suppressed for review-only rows; nothing changes until the publisher is verified.
prompt_questions.what_works_if_denied: Local editing and manifest inspection remain available; the extension is not enabled.
prompt_questions.grant_persistence_statement: Once — review-only path does not mint a remembered grant.

declared_permissions.rationale_label: Contribute a command for opening the user's quick notes.

install_decision.decision_summary: Review-only: unverified publisher; manifest landed for review without enabling.
